text:
Created attachment 223407
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.25.2

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.25.2, which includes minor fixes since the v2.25.0 release.

A full changelog can be found at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.25.2

-David
